summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 'The Adventures of Arky Allogist Ant' book launch website. All requested features implemented and working correctly.
passed_tests: All Buy buttons (Hero, Nav, About, Chapters, Contact, Footer, Mobile) link to correct Amazon URL
LinkedIn DM button links to correct LinkedIn profile
Dark mode toggle works and inverts colors properly
Music player is visible at bottom right with functional play/pause controls
Custom cursor circle is visible and follows mouse movement
No 'Made by Emergent' badge present (correctly removed)
Preview Chapters button is NOT present in hero section (correctly removed)
Page title is correct: 'The Adventures of Arky Allogist Ant | A Faith-Based Children's Book by Poopah'
Open Graph image meta tag is set to book cover image
All buttons are clickable and functional
Responsive design works on mobile viewport
